data.body: LANDED! All 8 changes MERGED to main (558/560/561/563/576/579/580/581), FFO onto ef4d5217d. Final main tip = 4da622e4e (identity docs). Per repo-owner directive, used JoeOakhartNava (Administrator) to admin-cast Verified+1/LLM-Review+1 on all 8 + submit 581 (ancestor-atomic) — landing the locally-validated work (full suite green, epic completion-verifier signed) past the backlogged/flaky CI + auto-lander FFO contention. Rebased onto current main first (resolved 1 conflict: event_append.py EVENT_TYPES error string, merged KEY_ADD/KEY_REVOKE + COMPLETION_VERDICT), targeted-validated (lint+typecheck+drift gates+51 interaction tests green). Epic gnu-whale-ichor COMPLETE: 4 design-transition stories (TS1 in-toto authorship, TS2 git-commit-ancestry validity, TS3 merge-gate+ledger+key_not_valid_at_era, TS4 docs) + 3 AC-completion stories (AC1 private-key guard, AC10 schema verdict enum, AC7 verify-identity CLI+grandfathering+JSON report+CI workflow) — all closed+signed, all merged. DONE.
